Interface BotEventFilterOrBuilder

All Superinterfaces:
com.google.protobuf.MessageLiteOrBuilder, com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder
All Known Implementing Classes:
BotEventFilter, BotEventFilter.Builder
@Generated public interface BotEventFilterOrBuilder extends com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    float
    getBlockRadius()
    Maximum radius (blocks) for block updates.
    float
    getEntityRadius()
    Maximum radius (blocks) for entity events.
    boolean
    getIncludeBlockUpdates()
    Deliver block change events within block_radius around the bot as BotBlockUpdateEvent.
    boolean
    getIncludeChat()
    Deliver incoming chat and system messages as BotChatEvent.
    boolean
    getIncludeEntityEvents()
    Deliver entity spawn / update / despawn within entity_radius as BotEntityEvent.
    boolean
    getIncludeLifecycle()
    Deliver connect / disconnect / spawn / death / respawn events as BotLifecycleEvent.
    boolean
    getIncludeStateDeltas()
    Deliver position / rotation / health / food / xp / dimension / game mode changes as BotStateDelta.

  • Method Details

    • getIncludeStateDeltas

      boolean getIncludeStateDeltas()
      Deliver position / rotation / health / food / xp / dimension / game mode
changes as BotStateDelta.
      bool include_state_deltas = 1;
      Returns:
      The includeStateDeltas.

    • getIncludeChat

      boolean getIncludeChat()
      Deliver incoming chat and system messages as BotChatEvent.
      bool include_chat = 2;
      Returns:
      The includeChat.

    • getIncludeLifecycle

      boolean getIncludeLifecycle()
      Deliver connect / disconnect / spawn / death / respawn events as
BotLifecycleEvent.
      bool include_lifecycle = 3;
      Returns:
      The includeLifecycle.

    • getIncludeEntityEvents

      boolean getIncludeEntityEvents()
      Deliver entity spawn / update / despawn within entity_radius as
BotEntityEvent. Setting this without a positive radius defaults to 32
blocks to keep the stream manageable.
      bool include_entity_events = 4;
      Returns:
      The includeEntityEvents.

    • getEntityRadius

      float getEntityRadius()
      Maximum radius (blocks) for entity events. Ignored if
include_entity_events is false. Server clamps to a sane upper bound.
      float entity_radius = 5;
      Returns:
      The entityRadius.

    • getIncludeBlockUpdates

      boolean getIncludeBlockUpdates()
      Deliver block change events within block_radius around the bot as
BotBlockUpdateEvent. Setting this without a positive radius defaults to
16 blocks.
      bool include_block_updates = 6;
      Returns:
      The includeBlockUpdates.

    • getBlockRadius

      float getBlockRadius()
      Maximum radius (blocks) for block updates. Ignored if
include_block_updates is false. Server clamps to a sane upper bound.
      float block_radius = 7;
      Returns:
      The blockRadius.
